case_title: PATRICIA ANGELIQUE CLARK et al VS. GRIFFITH CALLANDER et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-24-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-24-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-31-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
